prompt: Help me learn about fractions. I'm an adult refreshing my high school math. I want exercises I can practice with.

assertions.text: diataxis.toml exists and is valid TOML
At least 3 topics defined in diataxis.toml
All 4 quadrant types (tutorial, howto, reference, explanation) have at least one file
At least one marimo .py exercise notebook exists
Tutorial files contain step-by-step instructions with visible results
Reference files use tables or structured lists, not narrative prose
Math expressions use LaTeX notation with standard delimiters ($, $$, or backslash parens)
